message:
test(websocket): add regression for close-validation codec poisoning

After investigating a potential state-reset omission in the close
payload validation refactor, confirmed that the outer decode() method
intentionally poisons the codec on any error. Added a regression test
that verifies the poisoning behavior after invalid close code rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
